results.rendered_html:
amarṣaṇa (3. a + ma˚)
1〉 adj. der nichts hingehen lässt, sich nichts gefallen lässt, leicht aufbrausend, zornig  AK. 3,1,32 .  H. 392 .  N. 12,40 .  DRAUP. 7,17 .  R. 4,9,64 . 14,1 . 35,31 . 5,89,2 . 6,4,26 . 79,29 . 100,15 .  SUŚR. 1,335,21 .  RAGH. 3,53 . atyama˚  HIḌ. 4,54 . raṇāma˚  R. 4,22,5 .
— 2〉 m. N. pr. = 2. amarṣa 2.  BHĀG. P. _in_ LIA. I, Anh. CVII (zu S. XII, N. 27.) .

results.rendered_html:
amarṣaṇa, -rṣita, -rṣin, -rṣavat a.
1 Impatient, intolerant, unforgiving; viśeṣātparipūrṇasya yāti śatroramarṣaṇaḥ ābhimukhyaṃ  Pt. 1. 326. 
2 Angry, indignant, passionate; hṛdi kṣato gotrabhidapyamarṣaṇaḥ  R. 3. 53 ; abhimanyuvadhāmarṣitaiḥ pāṃḍuputraiḥ  Ve. 4. 
3 Impetuous, determined.
